matches.match_rationale: Salary grade and allowance logic is fragmented across campus-specific spreadsheets. AI-assisted ETL can normalize field definitions.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An AI-assisted tool that maps each campus payroll spreadsheet fields to a unified master salary grade schema.

matches.match_rationale: Anomaly detection can flag records where pay components deviate from expected values for the employee role and grade.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An anomaly detection layer surfacing employees whose total compensation is statistically inconsistent with peers in the same grade.

matches.match_rationale: The cascade of manual re-work when a salary grade changes is a multi-step workflow automation can handle.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A payroll adjustment agent that propagates grade changes across all affected staff records and flags outliers for approval.

matches.match_rationale: AI code generation can translate natural-language salary policy into executable, version-controlled logic.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A tool where HR describes allowance rules in plain language and AI generates the corresponding payroll calculation logic.
